reviews.comment:
Estuvo bien, una sola chica atendiendo, por suerte no había mucha gente. En ese momento 30/12/2023 no les andaba el postnet o internet, no sé, solo efectivo. Atrás tiene un parquizado con columpios y subibajas. Ojalá la puedan mejorar un poco, pero está bien para pasar.

(Translated by Google)
It was okay, just one girl working, luckily it wasn't too crowded. At that time, December 30, 2023, their card reader or internet wasn't working, I don't know, they only accepted cash. There's a park in the back with swings and seesaws. I hope they can improve it a bit, but it's fine for a quick stop.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUROLXItUGVREAE
